product.name: TEECK Shower Curtain Rod, 32-79 inch Adjustable Tension Spring, 1 Inch Shower Curtain Rod Tension, Anti-Slip, Rust-Proof, No Drilling, for Bathroom, Black
features: Specially customized for the dimensions of typical American bathrooms: Adjusted to suit any standard bathroom stall space ranging from 32 to 79 inches.
Easy Installation: Simply extend this shower curtain rod between two walls and tighten it.
No Tools Necessary: Features a flexible, innovative design—no drilling, no wall damage, for a quick, hassle-free installation.
Maintains Tension: Supports up to 30 lbs for shower curtains or liners, with strong tension that prevents sagging. Soft silicone ends protect walls from scratches.
Rust-resistant and Textured Metal: Made from premium rust-resistant metal with a refined texture that enhances your bathroom’s look.
